posts.author: baruchm (Baruch Moroz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am looking to have a capability that will allow me to highlight a column in (similar to excel) so when a user scrolls down the Gantt, the selected column stands out of the other columns from top to bottom (for this matter, the column can be day, week, month,…).

Thank you
Baruch
